parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-opus-4-5', max_tokens: 1000, system: 'You are the Angel Precision Proof Agent. Summarize today\'s trading operations data into a clear EOD report. Tone: factual, operational, no hype, no return promises. Return JSON only.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `Date: ${$json.date}. Trades: ${$json.trades_total} total, ${$json.wins}W/${$json.losses}L, ${$json.win_rate}% win rate, avg ${$json.avg_pnl}%. Best: +${$json.best_trade}%, Worst: ${$json.worst_trade}%. Rejections: ${$json.rejections}. Watch failures: ${$json.watch_failures}. Details: ${$json.trade_details}. Return JSON: { "discord_summary": "", "linkedin_post": "", "x_post": "", "safe_to_share": false, "requires_review": true }` }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ embeds: [{ title: `📊 Angel Precision — EOD Report ${$('Build EOD Summary').first().json.date}`, color: $json.win_rate >= 60 ? 3066993 : $json.win_rate >= 40 ? 16776960 : 15158332, fields: [{ name: 'Trades', value: `${$json.trades_total} total`, inline: true }, { name: 'Win Rate', value: `${$json.win_rate}%`, inline: true }, { name: 'Avg P&L', value: `${$json.avg_pnl}%`, inline: true }, { name: 'Best', value: `+${$json.best_trade}%`, inline: true }, { name: 'Worst', value: `${$json.worst_trade}%`, inline: true }, { name: 'Rejections', value: String($json.rejections), inline: true }], description: $json.discord_summary || 'No summary generated.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ linkedin_morning: $json.linkedin_post, x_morning: $json.x_post, theme: 'EOD Proof Report', generated_at: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), status: 'PENDING_APPROVAL', approval_required: true, safe_to_share: $json.safe_to_share }) }}
